content:
[Context: from sleep | sleep deprivation, like, really messes with hormone levels — especially cortisol and insulin, you know, it's a big deal...]
Follow-up question: how do you prevent
establishing a consistent sleep schedule, like, going to bed and waking up at the same time every day — that helps regulate those hormones, you know...
having a bedtime routine, like, reading a book or something, to help you wind down — it makes a big difference, you know...
no problem, have a great day, by the way...
the integral of x, uh, is x squared, over 2, you know...
that's an easy one, 20 times 20, like, is 400, yeah...
